title: Stalled Session Quiet Check
description: CLI contract for quiet-window evidence collection (Resume/S2 stalled-session recovery)

owner.description: Repository owner used for helper collection

repo.description: Repository name used for helper collection

number.description: Pull request number evaluated by the helper

quiet_window_ms.description: Quiet-window duration used for this evaluation

claim_created_at.description: Trusted active-claim heartbeat timestamp passed to the helper, or null

quiet_window_met.description: Whether the quiet window is satisfied

quiet_window_ms.description: Quiet-window duration used for the evaluation

window_start.description: Inclusive lower bound for timestamped activity checks

now.description: Reference timestamp used for the evaluation

latest_activity.description: Most recent blocking activity timestamp, or null when none were observed

latest_activity_type.description: Activity type for latest_activity, or null when none were observed

reason.description: Stable summary of the quiet-window outcome

activity_count_in_window.description: Number of blocking activities that broke the quiet window

blocking_activities.description: Blocking activity records considered by the helper

timestamp.description: Activity timestamp, or null for timestamp-less ci-running inputs

has_heartbeat_in_window.description: Whether a trusted active-claim heartbeat was observed in the quiet window

has_ci_running.description: Whether running or queued CI was observed

has_pr_head_movement.description: Whether PR head movement was observed in the quiet window

has_branch_tip_movement.description: Whether branch-tip movement was observed in the quiet window
